school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Hale's grade is immediately next to the member of the Scouts club's grade.

The member of the Choir club's period is between the class in the Greenhouse's period and the class with 89%'s period.
Period 3 goes with none of Cloister, 94%, or 99%.

Period 1 goes with exactly two of Nash, Studio, Chess, and 79%.

Scouts goes with either Boyd or Pavilion (but not both).
Nash's period is immediately below the member of the Scouts club's period.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
